definition: value as specified by level (minTypmax) of the quotient of a wideband amplifier of: 1) the amplitude of the frequency component arising by the superposition of two input signals with specified amplitude and frequency (or channel) measured at a specified frequency (or channel), and 2) the amplitude of one of two original frequencies at specified supply voltage, temperature and temperature type

definition_ml.en: value as specified by level (minTypmax) of the quotient of a wideband amplifier of: 1) the amplitude of the frequency component arising by the superposition of two input signals with specified amplitude and frequency (or channel) measured at a specified frequency (or channel), and 2) the amplitude of one of two original frequencies at specified supply voltage, temperature and temperature type

remark: Measuring method:| V_p} = V_o},   f_p} = f_1}   (channel p);| V_q} = V_o},   f_q} = f_2}   (channel q).| 2nd-order beat measured at (f_1} + f_2}).
